properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 C3 V4 V5 V1 V2 C3 V4 V5 V6

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Standing in awe of your grace Setting my feet in your ways Entering into your presence To behold you face to face

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: God of all heaven and earth Holding me in your embrace Unfailing love that surrounds me Oh… God I stand amazed

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: My Jesus, my Lord You're the love of my life Wherever you go Wanna be by your side No longer I But Christ living in me Serving you for all eternity

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: My eyes set on you In this race that I run No longer my ways Let your will be done

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Make me a servant My heart's ever true Clinging to the cross I'll follow you I'll follow you

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: I'll follow you I'll follow you
